---
title: "UI Style Guide — Panel Map & CSS Customisation Reference"
subtitle: "How to adapt the visual style of every UI region without breaking the app"
date: "2026-05-03"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: false
---

## Overview

All visual styling lives in **`config/ui/theme.css`**, organised into 18 numbered sections
(see §-reference at the end of this document).
The Python UI code in `app/handlers/` and `app/modules/` is intentionally style-free
except for **three classes of inline style that must never be moved to CSS**:

| What | Why it cannot move |
|---|---|
| `background-color: #e9ecef` on the Blueprint *Live Data Glimpse* button | Bootstrap collapse wires `data-bs-toggle` to the `<button>` — if CSS wins the background the `!important` war, the button still works but may lose its visual toggle state |
| `overflow: visible` on `div.spv-panel` wrapping `#acc_home_data` | Selectize dropdowns inside the data-preview body must be able to overflow the accordion boundary. `overflow: hidden` (required for `border-radius` clipping) breaks them. |
| Dynamic `style=` attributes on audit-node badges | Set by Python at render time from recipe metadata; not predictable at CSS authoring time |

---

## Global layout

```
┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  BANNER  (optional, persona-driven)          .sparmvet-banner          │
├─────────────────┬──────────────────────────────┬───────────────────────┤
│  LEFT SIDEBAR   │  CENTRAL THEATER             │  RIGHT SIDEBAR        │
│  #nav_sidebar   │  .central-theater            │  #audit_sidebar       │
│  (aside.sidebar)│  output_ui("dynamic_tabs")   │  (persona-gated)      │
│  ~340 px fixed  │  → per-view HTML rendered    │  ~340 px fixed        │
└─────────────────┴──────────────────────────────┴───────────────────────┘
```

The three-column layout is a **bslib `layout_sidebar`** (left) wrapping a second
`layout_sidebar` (right) inside the main content area.
The CSS variables that control column widths are set at §12 (`--bslib-sidebar-width`,
`--bslib-sidebar-padding`).

### What you can change globally

| Property | How |
|---|---|
| Page background | `body { background-color: … }` §1 |
| Left/right sidebar background | `--bslib-sidebar-bg` CSS variable on `#nav_sidebar` §3 and `#audit_sidebar` §5 |
| Primary accent colour | Replace `#345beb` everywhere — use a global find-replace; **do not change individual rules one by one** |
| Banner background / border | `.sparmvet-banner` §1 |

### What you cannot change globally (without Python changes)

| Property | Constraint |
|---|---|
| Sidebar widths | Set via Python `width=` argument in `layout_sidebar()`; CSS variable only adjusts padding |
| Nav-pill order (Home / Blueprint / Test Lab / Gallery) | Python list in `home_theater.py` |
| Which accordion panels are shown per persona | Controlled by `bootloader.is_enabled()` flags in persona templates |

---

## Primary colour token

**`#345beb`** is the single primary blue used throughout the app.
It replaces Bootstrap's default `#0d6efd` and Shiny's built-in `#007bc2`.

::: {.callout-warning}
**Shiny uses its own Bootstrap build.**
Shiny's Bootstrap variant compiles checkbox/radio checked-state colours as a hardcoded
value (`#007bc2`), not a CSS variable.
The CSS variable `--bs-form-check-input-checked-bg-color` has **no effect**.
To override checked-state colour you must target the Shiny-specific selector:

```css
#nav_sidebar .shiny-input-container .radio input:checked,
#nav_sidebar .shiny-input-container .checkbox input:checked,
#nav_sidebar .form-check-input:checked { … }
```

Even with that selector the override may still lose to internal Shiny specificity on some
input types — see §3 for what is currently wired and what remains `#007bc2`.
:::

---

## VIEW 1 — Home

```
LEFT SIDEBAR (#nav_sidebar)
│  Nav Pills Strip
│  ├── Manifest Choice       (accordion, open at startup)
│  ├── Data Import           (accordion, collapsed at startup)
│  ├── Filters               (accordion, collapsed at startup)
│  ├── Global Project Export (accordion, collapsed at startup)
│  └── Session Management   (accordion, collapsed at startup)
│
CENTRAL THEATER (.theater-container-main)
│  Theater Header Strip      (.theater-header-strip)
│  │  "Data to show:"        (ui.tags.span, inline colour #345beb)
│  │  T1 / T2 / T3 toggle   (radio buttons)
│  Groups Pill Nav           (#home_groups_nav, navset_pill)
│  └── Active Group Tab
│       └── Plot Subtab Card (#subtabs_{group_id}, navset_card_tab)
│  Data Preview              (#acc_home_data, bslib accordion)
│
RIGHT SIDEBAR (#audit_sidebar)
│  Pipeline Audit card
│  ├── card-header           "Pipeline Audit"
│  ├── ⏳ Pending badge
│  ├── Tier 2 ─ h6          (repeats)
│  ├── Tier 3 ─ h6          (repeats)
│  └── [Apply] button        #btn_apply
```

### Home — element selectors and style notes

| Element | CSS selector | Default | Modifiable? |
|---|---|---|---|
| Nav pills strip wrapper | `#nav_sidebar .flex-column > .bg-white` | white bg, rounded | Yes — §1b |
| Nav pill (inactive) | `#nav_sidebar .nav-pills .nav-link:not(.active)` | `#345beb` text | Yes — §6 |
| Nav pill (active) | `#nav_sidebar .nav-pills .nav-link.active` | `#345beb` bg, white text | Yes — §6 |
| Any sidebar accordion header | `#nav_sidebar .accordion-button` | bg `#a0a0a0`, 0.85rem/700 | Yes — §3 |
| Any sidebar accordion body | `#nav_sidebar .accordion-body` | bg `#c0c0c0` | Yes — §3 |
| Theater header strip | `.theater-header-strip` | white bg, rounded 10px | Yes — §12 |
| "Data to show:" label | Python inline `style=` on `ui.tags.span` | `#345beb`, 0.85rem | **Python only** — no CSS selector |
| T1/T2/T3 radio (checked bg) | `#nav_sidebar .shiny-input-container .radio input:checked` | `#345beb` | Partial — §3; see Shiny note above |
| Groups pill nav bar | `.theater-container-main .nav-pills .nav-link` | `#345beb` text/bg | Yes — §6 |
| Plot subtab card header | `#subtabs_{group_id} .card-header` | `.card-header` default | Yes — §5 / §18 |
| Data Preview accordion header | `#acc_home_data .accordion-button` | `#345beb`, 0.85rem/700 | Yes — §16 |
| Data Preview accordion item | `#acc_home_data .accordion-item` | `border-radius: 7px` | Yes — §11 |
| Data Preview accordion body | `#acc_home_data .accordion-body` | `overflow: visible` | **Do not set `overflow: hidden`** — breaks selectize dropdowns |
| Pipeline Audit card | `#audit_sidebar .card` | `border-radius: 8px`, `margin-top: 8px` | Yes — §5 |
| Pipeline Audit card header | `#audit_sidebar .card-header` | white bg, `#345beb` text, centred | Yes — §5 |
| "Pipeline Audit" h5 | `#audit_sidebar .card-header h5` | `#345beb` | Yes — §13 |
| Tier divider h6 (Active Logic Stack etc.) | `#audit_sidebar h6` | `#345beb`, 0.85rem/700 | Yes — §16 |
| Tier 2 node | `.audit-node-tier2` | bg `#eef0fb` | Yes — §2 |
| Tier 3 node | `.audit-node-tier3` | bg `#e6f7f5` | Yes — §2 |
| Pending badge | `.recipe-pending-badge` | amber chip | Yes — §6 |
| Apply button | `#btn_apply` | `#345beb` bg, `.btn-primary` | Yes — §6 |
| Session delete button | `[id^="session_delete_"]` | amber `#ffc107` bg, black text | Yes — §6 |

---

## VIEW 2 — Blueprint Architect

```
LEFT SIDEBAR (#nav_sidebar)
│  Nav Pills Strip
│  ├── Master Manifest       (#wrangle_sidebar_accordion)
│  └── External Exchange
│
CENTRAL THEATER (.wrangle-studio-container)
│  View Title Banner         (.view-title-banner)
│  TubeMap                   (.spv-panel.mb-3 > #blueprint_tubemap_accordion)
│  Tri-tab Work Area         (#architect_internal_tabs, navset_card_pill)
│  │  1. Focus  2. Interface  3. YAML
│  Live Data Glimpse         (.card.shadow-sm.mb-2)
│  │  Bootstrap collapse toggle → #glimpse_body
│
RIGHT SIDEBAR (#audit_sidebar)
│  Blueprint Surgeon card
│  ├── card-header           "Blueprint Surgeon"
│  ├── Focused node info
│  └── Active Logic Stack   (h6 + .audit-node-tier3 repeats)
```

### Blueprint Architect — element selectors and style notes

| Element | CSS selector | Default | Modifiable? |
|---|---|---|---|
| View title banner | `.view-title-banner` | white bg, rounded 10px | Yes — §12 / §14-banner |
| Banner title text | `.view-title-banner .banner-title` | `#345beb`, 1.1rem/700 | Yes — §12 |
| TubeMap outer wrapper | `.wrangle-studio-container .spv-panel.mb-3` | card shadow, rounded | Yes — §2 |
| TubeMap accordion header | `#blueprint_tubemap_accordion .accordion-button` | bg `#f8f9fa`, text `#345beb` | Yes — §9 |
| TubeMap accordion header (expanded) | `#blueprint_tubemap_accordion .accordion-button:not(.collapsed)` | same as collapsed | Yes — §9 |
| TubeMap viewport | `#tubemap_viewport` | height 320px, bg `#fafafa` | Yes — §9 |
| Tri-tab card (whole) | `#architect_internal_tabs` | `navset_card_pill` default | Yes — §9 |
| Tri-tab pill links | `#architect_internal_tabs .nav-pills .nav-link` | inherited `#345beb` | Yes — §9 / §6 |
| Live Data Glimpse card | `.wrangle-studio-container .card.shadow-sm` | shadow, rounded | Yes — §18 |
| Glimpse header bg | Python inline `background: #e9ecef` on `<button>` | `#e9ecef` | **Python only** — CSS cannot safely override |
| Glimpse header button text | `.wrangle-studio-container .card-header .btn` | `#345beb`, 0.85rem/700 | Yes — §18 |
| Glimpse collapse body | `#glimpse_body` | max-h 280px, scrollable | Yes — §9 |
| Left sidebar accordion | `#wrangle_sidebar_accordion .accordion-button` | inherits `#nav_sidebar` rules | Yes — §3 |
| Blueprint Surgeon card | `#audit_sidebar .card` | `border-radius: 8px` | Yes — §5 |
| Blueprint Surgeon card-header | `#audit_sidebar .card-header` | white bg, `#345beb` text | Yes — §5 |
| Active Logic Stack h6 | `#audit_sidebar h6` | `#345beb`, 0.85rem/700 | Yes — §16 |

---

## VIEW 3 — Test Lab

```
LEFT SIDEBAR (#nav_sidebar)
│  Nav Pills Strip
│  └── Data Import
│
CENTRAL THEATER (.theater-container-main)
│  View Title Banner         (.view-title-banner)
│  Generation Configuration  (card)
│  Environment Audit         (card)
│
RIGHT SIDEBAR (#audit_sidebar)
│  Dev Inspector card
```

### Test Lab — element selectors and style notes

| Element | CSS selector | Default | Modifiable? |
|---|---|---|---|
| View title banner | `.view-title-banner` | shared with Blueprint/Gallery | Yes — §12 |
| Central cards | `.theater-container-main .card` | §18 defaults | Yes — §18 |
| Central card headers | `.theater-container-main .card-header` | `#345beb` text | Yes — §18 |
| Dev Inspector card | `#audit_sidebar .card` | `border-radius: 8px` | Yes — §5 |
| Dev Inspector card-header | `#audit_sidebar .card-header` | white bg, `#345beb` text | Yes — §5 |

Test Lab reuses the same sidebar accordion rules as Home (§3).
All card header / body rules from §18 apply.

---

## VIEW 4 — Gallery

```
LEFT SIDEBAR (#nav_sidebar)
│  Nav Pills Strip
│  ├── 🖼️ Recipe             (#gallery_sidebar_accordion > #gallery_recipe_select)
│  └── 🔍 Gallery Taxonomy   (.gallery-sidebar-group ×6 filters)
│       [▶ Apply]
│
CENTRAL THEATER (.theater-container-main)
│  View Title Banner         (.view-title-banner)
│  Preview accordion         (#gallery_preview_accordion)
│  │  body (flush): #gallery_tech_tabs  (navset_card_tab)
│  │    Plot Preview | Data Sample | YAML
│  Guidance accordion        (#gallery_guidance_accordion)
│       "📖 Visual Cookbook: Guidance"
│       body: .gallery-md-pane (Markdown render)
│
RIGHT SIDEBAR (#audit_sidebar)
│  Gallery Explorer card     (placeholder)
```

### Gallery — element selectors and style notes

| Element | CSS selector | Default | Modifiable? |
|---|---|---|---|
| View title banner | `.view-title-banner` | shared | Yes — §12 |
| Gallery sidebar accordion | `#gallery_sidebar_accordion .accordion-button` | inherits §3 | Yes — §3 |
| Taxonomy filter title | `.gallery-filter-title` | 0.85rem/700/uppercase | Yes — §13 |
| Taxonomy filter group | `.gallery-sidebar-group` | padding + border | Yes — §13 |
| Preview accordion header | `#gallery_preview_accordion .accordion-button` | bg `#f8f9fa`, `#345beb` text | Yes — §14 |
| Preview accordion item | `#gallery_preview_accordion .accordion-item` | `border: none`, `border-radius: 8px` | Yes — §14 |
| Preview tabs | `#gallery_tech_tabs` | `navset_card_tab` default | Yes — §14 |
| Guidance accordion item | `#gallery_guidance_accordion .accordion-item` | bg `#fff9c4`, `border-radius: 7px`, `overflow: hidden` | Yes — §17; `overflow: hidden` is intentional here (no dropdowns inside) |
| Guidance header (collapsed) | `#gallery_guidance_accordion .accordion-button` | bg `#fff3c4`, `#345beb` text | Yes — §17 |
| Guidance header (expanded) | `#gallery_guidance_accordion .accordion-button:not(.collapsed)` | bg `#fff9c4`, `#345beb` text | Yes — §17 |
| Guidance body bg | `#gallery_guidance_accordion .accordion-body` | bg `#fff9c4` | Yes — §17 |
| Guidance Markdown content | `.gallery-md-pane` | headings, blockquote, images, tables | Yes — §17 |
| Gallery Explorer card | `#audit_sidebar .card` | `border-radius: 8px` | Yes — §5 |
| Gallery Explorer card-header | `#audit_sidebar .card-header` | white bg, `#345beb` text | Yes — §5 |

---

## Colour tokens in use

| Role | Value | Where set |
|---|---|---|
| Primary blue (buttons, active pills, headings) | `#345beb` | §6, §3, §5, §9, §14, §16, §17, §18 |
| Primary blue hover | `#2a4bc4` | §6 |
| Export / teal | `#10a395` | §6 — `#export_*`, `#btn_export`, `#filter_add_row` |
| Reset / amber | `#ffc107` | §6 — `#filter_reset`, `.recipe-pending-badge`, session delete buttons |
| Sidebar accordion header | `#a0a0a0` | §3 |
| Sidebar accordion body | `#c0c0c0` | §3 (`--bslib-sidebar-bg`) |
| Page background | `#d1d1d1` | §1 |
| Theater panel / strip bg | `#ffffff` | §1, §2, §12 |
| Collapsed accordion header (theater) | `#f8f9fa` | §18 |
| Expanded accordion header (theater) | `#ffffff` | §18 |
| Blueprint Glimpse header (inline only) | `#e9ecef` | Python inline — cannot be CSS-overridden safely |
| Gallery guidance bg | `#fff9c4` | §17 |
| Audit node T2 bg | `#eef0fb` | §2 |
| Audit node T3 bg | `#e6f7f5` | §2 |

---

## Typography scale

| Tier | Size | Weight | Used for |
|---|---|---|---|
| Primary | `0.85rem` | `700` | Accordion headers, section h6, badges |
| Secondary | `0.80rem` | `400–600` | Body text, form labels |
| Micro | `0.65–0.72rem` | `400` | Helper text, dtype chips, session meta |

---

## CSS sections reference (`config/ui/theme.css`)

| § | Line | Title | Key selectors |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | 29 | Layout & Backgrounds | `body`, `.sparmvet-banner`, `.spv-panel` |
| 1b | 39 | Sidebar nav-pills block | `#nav_sidebar .flex-column > .bg-white` |
| 2 | 54 | Panel Token | `.spv-panel`, `.audit-node-*`, theater cards |
| 2b | 80 | Sidebar info/warning text | `#nav_sidebar .text-muted` → `#345beb` |
| 3 | 87 | High-Density Nav Sidebar | All `#nav_sidebar` accordion + form elements |
| 4 | 135 | Sidebar Toggle | `.collapse-toggle` |
| 5 | 146 | Global Card & Theatre Polish | `.central-theater .card-header`, `#audit_sidebar` |
| 6 | 154 | Button Harmonization | `.btn-primary`, teal export buttons, amber reset, session delete |
| 7 | 237 | Ingest & Upload UI | `.upload-row`, `#nav_sidebar .input-group` |
| 8 | 300 | Header Controls | `.active-view-btn`, `.control-btn`, `.ultra-small` |
| 9 | 309 | Wrangle Studio | `#architect_internal_tabs`, `#blueprint_tubemap_accordion`, `#glimpse_body` |
| 10 | 333 | Comparison Theater | `.reference-pane`, `.active-pane` |
| 11 | 339 | Column Picker | `.column-picker-container`, `#acc_home_data .accordion-body` |
| 12 | 362 | Structural Gaps & Layout | `.bslib-sidebar-layout`, `.theater-header-strip`, `.view-title-banner` |
| 13 | 415 | Gallery Sidebar & Filter UI | `.gallery-filter-title`, `.gallery-sidebar-group` |
| 14 | 433 | Gallery Theater accordions | `#gallery_preview_accordion`, `#gallery_guidance_accordion` header/item |
| 15 | 474 | Scientific Table | `table`, `th`, `td`, zebra rows |
| 16 | 483 | Theater & Audit Typography | `#audit_sidebar` h5/h6, `.audit-node-*`, `#acc_home_data .accordion-button` |
| 17 | 533 | Educational Guidance Pane | `.gallery-md-pane` — headings, blockquote, tables, images; guidance accordion colours |
| 18 | 626 | Accordion normalisation | `.theater-container-main` + `.wrangle-studio-container` accordion globals; Bootstrap collapse cards |

---

## Hard constraints — do not override these

::: {.callout-important}
### Rules that protect functionality

1. **`overflow: visible` on `#acc_home_data .accordion-body` (§11)**
   Selectize dropdowns inside the column picker must overflow the accordion boundary.
   Adding `overflow: hidden` here will silently clip the dropdown — it disappears off-screen.

2. **`#gallery_guidance_accordion .accordion-item { overflow: hidden }` (§17)**
   This *is* intentional and safe because there are no interactive dropdowns inside the
   guidance accordion. It is needed so that `border-radius` clips the yellow background
   correctly on the bottom corners.

3. **`border-radius` on `.accordion-item` vs. `overflow: hidden` on parent**
   If you need rounded accordion items that contain dropdowns: apply `border-radius`
   directly to the `.accordion-item` (the background clips to its own `border-radius`
   without needing `overflow: hidden` on any ancestor).

4. **Python inline `background: #e9ecef` on the Live Data Glimpse `<button>`**
   The button is a Bootstrap `data-bs-toggle="collapse"` target.
   Do not add `!important` CSS that wins this property — it desynchronises the visual
   toggle state from the DOM open/closed state.

5. **`#acc_home_data .accordion-item { border-radius: 7px }` (§11)**
   This fixes a Bootstrap cascade where first-child/last-child rules zero out the top
   corners on a single-item accordion. If you add more items to this accordion remove
   the direct `border-radius` rule and let Bootstrap handle corner rounding naturally.
:::

---

## Known dead CSS rules (safe to delete)

| Selector | Location | Why dead |
|---|---|---|
| `#central_theater_tabs.card.navset-card-tab` | §2 line 76, §9 lines 285–286 | ID removed from Python; never rendered |
| `#central_theater_tabs > .card-header .nav-tabs` | §5 line 137 | Same |
